title: DOM elements with ARIA roles should include a valid non-abstract role
description: DOM elements with ARIA roles should have a valid non-abstract roleAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalmaintainabilityreliabilityCode SmellreactaccessibilityWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoARIA (Accessible Rich Internet Applications) attributes are used to enhance the accessibility of web content and web applications. These attributes provide additional information about an element’s role, state, properties, and values to assistive technologies like screen readers.This rule checks that when using theroleproperty in DOM elements, its value is a valid non-abstract ARIA role.This rule does not cover non-DOM elements, such as custom components.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositori
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.
